excerpt: A customer portal is a secure online platform where your customers can log in and manage their rentals. Through a customer portal, customers usually can: View active and past rental orders Review, download, and pay invoices Request call-offs or extensions Update billing or contact information
24/7 customer WebPortal: Enable client self-service at any time.

Renterra’s Customer Portal makes it easy for clients to manage orders, view invoices, and track upcoming deliveries—all in one clean, branded dashboard. Your customers can log in anytime to get the info they need—no phone call required.

Give your customers a professional, easy-to-navigate storefront that works as hard as you do. The Integrated Online Storefront instantly connects to your Renterra account to display real-time inventory, pricing, and availability—so customers can browse, book, and check out on their own time.

Reducing inbound phone calls, speeding up collections, minimizing administrative work, and improving customer satisfaction can have a meaningful impact on operational efficiency. What was once viewed as a premium feature is quickly becoming an expected part of the rental experience.
